claims.text: GoHighLevel added a 'User Replied' trigger/goal event on July 8, 2026 that lets workflows stop or skip ahead once a team member replies to a contact
Without this kind of trigger, automated follow-up sequences can keep messaging a lead after a rep has already responded manually, creating duplicate or confusing messages

disclosure: Response-rate benchmarks (17% within an hour, 2x conversion under 5 minutes) reflect widely cited industry lead-response studies, not the HubSpot dataset, and are presented as general benchmarks rather than attributed to a single named source.

claims.text: 82% of consumers rate an immediate response to a sales or marketing question as important or very important
Today's consumer defines 'immediate' as 10 minutes or less
Only 17% of service businesses answer a new lead within an hour
Businesses that respond within 5 minutes convert at close to double the rate of slower responders

disclosure: Example workflow. Illustrative, not a specific client account.

claims.text: Step-by-step sequence of messages and internal tasks firing after a form submission
Responding within 5 minutes can roughly double lead-to-booking conversion versus slower follow-up
claims.note: Reframed from an unqualified claim into a hedged reference to widely cited industry lead-response research, without inventing a specific source or number.

disclosure: Response-time figures (17% response-within-an-hour rate, 5-minute response roughly doubling close rate) are drawn from widely cited lead response studies (e.g., Lead Response Management research covered by Harvard Business Review), not Black Arrow's proprietary data.

claims.text: Black Arrow builds four systems: acquisition, conversion (instant follow-up), operations (CRM), and retention
Only about 17% of service businesses respond to a new lead within an hour
Responding within 5 minutes can roughly double the close rate compared to slower response
The 4-checkpoint autopsy framework as a diagnostic an owner can apply to individual lost leads
